copilot._comment: apiKey: GitHub PAT with Copilot access (takes priority). clientId: GitHub OAuth App ID for in-app 'Sign in with GitHub' flow (device flow). If neither is set, the GitHub CLI token (~/.config/gh/hosts.yml) is used automatically. Endpoint defaults to https://api.githubcopilot.com/chat/completions

openai._comment: Set apiKey to your OpenAI API key. Endpoint defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions
